title: Daily Signal Brief 002 — three ATS vendors have shipped MCP in six days
summary: Workable joined Greenhouse and Ashby with a 38-tool MCP server on 2026-05-13, included at no upcharge. The pattern is now a category move, not a coincidence. Top alert L3. Brief recommends Forge publish a tool-count side-by-side this week and Compass replace standalone 'MCP-native' copy with 'MCP-native, eval-governed, four-server.' Also surfaces Lattice's 'AI will not submit reviews on the manager's behalf' commitment as a governance pattern our eval set should mirror, plus an EU Omnibus formal-vote calendar update (June/July) and the just-passed California pay-data deadline.
